lessons.title: Select Queries
lessons.description: The heart of SQL: pick columns with SELECT, filter rows with WHERE, and control the output with ORDER BY and LIMIT.

lessons.title: Joins & Set Operators
lessons.description: Combine tables with INNER and OUTER joins, stack results with UNION and friends, and join a table to itself.

lessons.title: Summary Queries
lessons.description: Aggregate functions, GROUP BY, and HAVING: turn thousands of rows into counts, totals, and averages.

lessons.title: Subqueries
lessons.description: Queries inside queries: scalar subqueries, IN and EXISTS, correlated subqueries, and derived tables.

lessons.title: Insert, Update & Delete
lessons.description: Change data, not just read it: add rows with INSERT, fix them with UPDATE, and remove them with DELETE — safely.

lessons.title: DDL: Creating Tables & Schemas
lessons.description: CREATE, ALTER, and DROP: define tables, constraints, keys, indexes, and views in an empty sandbox database.

lessons.title: Database Design Fundamentals
lessons.description: Entities, keys, relationships, and normalization: how to shape tables so your data stays consistent — with a graded knowledge check.
